titleStmt.title: SII 5.303: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 303. (A.R. No. 15 of 1894). ON THE NORTH WALL (INSIDE) OF THE ENCLOSURE OF THE TEMPLE AT VIKKIRAMANGALAM, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koṟcaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tri puvaṉaccakra vattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 9 Āvatu tulānāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣa ttu sapta miyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum
peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ maturaiutaiyavaḷanāṭṭu māṭakkuḷakkiḻt tirupparaṅkuṉṟattu goḷakima san=tati kiḻaimaṭattil mutaliyār śiṣya rkaḷil Aḻakiyatiru
cciṟṟampalamuṭaiyārkku nāṭṭut tecippaṭṭaṇamāṉa Aiyampoḻil vikra macoḻapurattu nakarattom nilavilaipra māṇam pa
ṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Iṉṉakarattut teṉpiṭākaik kiḻaik kiḻavaṉeri viṟpā ṉicaintu viṟṟukkuṭutta Itaṟku Ellaiāvatu Ivvūṟkuc cūḻe
llaikkuk kiḻellai Ippaṟṟil cuṭṭiṟai ceṅkuḷappaṟṟukkum kaṇṇinallūṟpaṟṟukkum meṟku teṉṉellai karumāttūṟpaṟṟukkum pūttāḷerippaṟṟukkum va
ṭavellaikku vaṭakkum melellai cirāḷerik kiḻellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai Ariyāḷerippaṟṟukkum kāraikkuḷappaṟṟu
kkum teṉṉellaikkut teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa kuḷamiraṇṭum kuḷapparuppum nirkovaiyum nirnilamum puṉcey karu
ñ ceykaḷum nattamum nattappālum kaḷarun tiṭalum meṉokciṉa maramuṅ kiḻṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟum mīṉpaṭu paḷḷamun teṉpaṭupotumpum puṟṟun
teṟṟiyum Āmaitavaḻiyum Uṭumpoṭiyuñ cuṭukāṭum paṭittuṟaiyum Ivvūṟkup pokiṟa ciṟuvaḻi peruvaḻikaḷu mippaṟṟil kāṭum Oṭaikaḷum veḷ
ḷamum veḷḷaccāyvum Ikkuḷattil nīrvārikaḷum nīrkovaikaḷum maṟṟum Eppeṟ(yaṟ)paṭṭa samattappiṟattikaḷum Iṟṟaināḷāl Emmilic
aintu vilai niṟceyitta Irāci � 1000 Ippaṇam Āyiramum vilaiyāvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭi yeṟṟa kaiccelavaṟak koṇṭu vilaippiṟamāṇa
m paṇṇikkuṭuttom vikra macoḻapurattu nakarattom tirupparaṅkuṉṟattuk kiḻaimaṭattu mutaliyār śiṣya rkaḷil Aḻakiyaciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṟku I
ppaṭi viṟṟuk ta kiḻavaṉeri viṟaimuṟai kumpaṭi naṉcey puṉcey karuñay taṟiyiṟai cekkiṟai talaiyerpaṭaveṇṭukoḷ vi
ṉiyoka Ivvakaippaṭi vantaviṟai Iṟaiyil Iṉṉakara minta mariyāti māppe l māviḻukkāṭu
Oṉṟumuk viḻukkāṭu viḻuk tuṇpārākavum Iṉṉakarappaṟṟu niccayippu Iṟukkilum payir yiṟukkilum Ikki
ḻaikkiḻa Ipperunāṉkellaikkuḷ riyātiyā liṟutta maṉaippeṟṟil Itaṉāl vanta Araimaṉaikku Oṉṟumukkāl viḻukkāṭu
Iṟuttuṇpārākavum Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Ivviṟaimuṟaikkum Ikkuḷaṅkaḷukkum Ippaṟṟukkaḷukkum nirukkum pācikkum Ituve vilaiyolaiyum
poruṭcelavolaiyumāvatākavu mituvallatu veṟuvilaiyāvaṇac calāvaṇap poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭcelavolai kāṇavaṅ kā
ṭṭavuṅ kaṭavatiṉṟiye Orukālāvatu mirukālāvatu mukkālāvatum Olaikkuṟṟam Eḻuttukkuṟṟañ coṟkuṟṟam poruṭkuṟṟa maṟṟu meppeṟpaṭṭa kuṟṟamu
ṅ kuṟṟamaṉṟiye viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom . Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Ikkiḻaik kiḻavaṉeri maturaiutai nāya
ṉār koyiliṟ tirumalaiyile kallilum cempilum veṭṭuvittuk kuṭuttom vikkiramacoḻapurattu nakarattom Aḻakiyaci
Ippaṭik kivai cokkaṉ ṉāyaṉāṉa Ulakapāla(ṉ) ṉeḻuttu . Ippaṭik kivai tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ vapperumāḷāṉa Amaru
Ippaṭik kivai nāyaṉ peruṅkaruṇai Āḷaṉāṉa vaṇikacūriyaṉ(ṉ) ṉeḻuttu . Ippaṭik kivai kiyatevaṉ Āvattukkāttāṉāṉa Aṉai Eḻuttu .
Ippaṭik kivai nāyaṉ koṅkaṉāṉa Ulakamātākkaḷ Eḻuttu . tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ vitiviṭaṅkaṉāṉa vaḻutiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭik kivai
tevaṉ Uṭaiyāṉāṉa kaṉakapālaṉ Eḻuttu . Eḻumpotu Ariyatumuṭiccāṉāṉa pañcavaṉapallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu . Āṉantaṉ kūttāṭuvāṉ
Eḻuttu . veṇṭava ṉa Āṇṭāṉpiḷḷai Eḻuttu . Ippaṭik kivai nakarakkaṇakku Irāmaṉāṉa Aḻakiyapāṇṭiya Eḻuttu .
Ippaṭikku Ivveḻuttu veṭṭiṉeṉ rathakārapurandara ṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.303 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
